reviews.comment: Sharyn and Joe are awesome! They are friendly, knowledgeable, and don't try to squeeze every extra penny out of you like a lot of places do nowdays. I have been shopping around for about a year for window tint on my 2016 Subaru WRX. Needless to say I wanted the best and I received it. The quality of the product is phenomenal and the prices are great. My WRX has an small extra window on each door and every place I talked to wanted to charge extra for each window. Frederick Window Tinting isn't like that, they give you a flat rate whether you drive a truck, SUV, coupe or sedan. They are awesome and if you are looking for window tint you must see them.

reviews.comment: Absolutely amazing experience at Frederick Window Tinting! I had heard nothing but great things about them so I finally caved and snatched up their Black Friday special while I could. I messaged them that Thursday (Thanksgiving day) not expecting a response (it was mostly so I wouldn't forget) and they're so dedicated to their business I got a response almost instantly answering all of my questions and we even got to talking about modifying Jeeps since they own one also.  Scheduling my appointment was simple and I did it all through FB messenger which I personally liked but they were always available by phone, text or even to drop in.  I went in to get an idea of what percentage I wanted for my windows and Sharyn helped big time to make sure I didn't go light or darker than what I wanted.  They worked with us as far as dropping it off and picking it up after hours as I couldn't stay and wait and even made sure it was safely monitored on their camera (not that it was necessary just a nice security feature) when they closed up for the night.  Needless to say, I LOVE the tint job they did on my rubicon! I used to have to reach for my sunglasses all the time and was always worried my kids in the back seat were getting blinded by the sun but not any more! Thanks guy! I'll be back soon with another vehicle!

reviewReply.comment: Thank you so much for taking the time to leave us a review! We appreciate your continued business! We look forward to doing.... #4? #5? =)

reviews.comment:
I have had two cars tinted at Frederick Window Tinting in the last 2 years.  Having never had a vehicle tinted before, I was a bit nervous on selecting someone to do this work in a way that would meet my high standards.  I came across Frederick Window Tinting due to the very high review scores across the internet.

Both vehicles that I had Frederick Window Tinting work on came back in perfect condition, the tint was flawless and has not had any degredation in quality over time.

They were extremely communiciative and accomodating to my schedule, got the job done quickly, and got me on my way.

I could not be happier with the service I received and I will continue to take all of my vehicles to Frederick Window Tinting.

If you are like me and you are struggling with the decision about where to take your vehicle, just stop, and take it to Frederick Window Tinting today!
